hallTitle: Byte Bash Blitz — Hall of Legacy
subtitle: Where Legends Are Etched in Code

periods.name: Period I
periods.title: Foundation Era
periods.description: The dawn of Byte Bash Blitz. Pioneers who laid the first stones of our community.

members.name: Inscribed One
members.title: The Spark
members.story: Wrote the first CLI tool that bootstrapped our entire dev workflow. In a single weekend hackathon, they automated what took weeks. Their spark ignited a movement.

members.name: Inscribed Two
members.title: The Architect of Bridges
members.story: Built the API gateway that connected three disparate microservices into one cohesive system. Their bridge carried the weight of a thousand requests per second without flinching.

members.name: Inscribed Three
members.title: The Silent Guardian
members.story: Deployed the monitoring stack that saved production three times in the first month. They watched so others could sleep. Their dashboards became legendary.

periods.name: Period II
periods.title: Expansion Era
periods.description: The community grew beyond borders. New clans formed, new challenges conquered.

members.name: Inscribed Four
members.title: The Weaver
members.story: Designed the real-time collaboration engine that let 50 developers code simultaneously. Their threads of logic wove a tapestry of collective creation.

members.name: Inscribed Five
members.title: The Cartographer
members.story: Mapped the entire infrastructure into an interactive visualization. When chaos struck, their map guided the team through the storm to safe harbor.

members.name: Inscribed Six
members.title: The Alchemist
members.story: Transformed legacy spaghetti into clean, tested microservices. What was once feared became a model of modern architecture. Their alchemy turned lead into gold.

periods.name: Period III
periods.title: Ascension Era
periods.description: The era of mastery. The community reached new heights of technical excellence.

members.name: Architect Eta
members.motto: See the whole, fix the part.

members.name: Architect Theta
members.motto: Temper code in the fires of review.

members.name: Inscribed Seven
members.title: The Pathfinder
members.story: Created the onboarding pipeline that reduced new member ramp-up from weeks to days. Their path lit the way for hundreds who followed.

members.name: Inscribed Eight
members.title: The Timekeeper
members.story: Built the CI/CD pipeline that cut deploy times by 80%. When seconds mattered, their clockwork precision delivered. Zero downtime became the new normal.

members.name: Inscribed Nine
members.title: The Dreamsmith
members.story: Designed the community's open-source framework that was adopted by three external organizations. Their dream became everyone's reality.
